svg.text: ARTIST 4 -- NINE ANIMALS, NINE WAYS OF MOVING
Silhouette gate first: this is the strip that decides the cast. Flat black, halo included, all nine, both frames, at 18 and 32 px.
THE GATE -- flat black, at game size
DOCK BADGE -- the head crop at 18 px (and 64 px to read it)
mule: no face, no crop, no badge. It is a robot.
Every badge is a WINDOW onto frame 1, not new art.
FOUR PLAYER COLORS x THREE BACKGROUNDS, at 32 px (frame 1)
4x INSPECTION (256 px tall) -- for editing only. Nothing here is approved from this row.
